Indian Agriculture Research Institute asks some students to leave campus, shift to online classes amid 'energy crisis'
articles.description: Students of undergraduate batches, master's first year, and PhD first year batches at the Indian Agriculture Research Institute were asked to leave the campus and take their classes online starting April 6, 2026.

articles.title: Five, including three women, dead as speeding SUV hits auto-rickshaw in Gwalior
articles.description: Two separate cases have been lodged against the accused including one under BNS section 106(1) [causing death by negligence].

articles.title: The not-so-hidden cost of a faraway war
articles.description: LPG prices surge amid West Asia crisis, forcing Mumbai eateries to cut menus, raise prices or shrink portions as supply disruptions hit small businesses hard.

articles.title: Say no to VIP pressure during poll flying: DGCA tells pilots
articles.description: Aviation safety regulator issues a new order that replaces previous advisories, mandates a weather radar onboard, and recommends a terrain collision alert system

topStories.title: Tracing Puducherry’s voting pattern in the past three electoral battles
topStories.description: The AINRC remains the mainstay of the Union Territory’s political landscape, a position once occupied by the Congress. The decision of businessman Jose Charles Martin — who has deep pockets — to venture into electoral politics may have changed the dynamics of the 2026 election in Puducherry

topStories.title: ‘Humanitarian catastrophe’: While the world is focused on the war in Iran, something much worse is unfolding in Lebanon
topStories.description: Following the US-Israeli Operation Epic Fury against Iran, Israel's ground invasion of Lebanon has led to significant civilian casualties and displacement. UNICEF reports over 370,000 children have been uprooted, with many facing dire living conditions amid ongoing violence and humanitarian crises.

topStories.title: Congress releases list of 16 candidates for upcoming Puducherry elections
topStories.description: DPR Selvam will contest from Mannadipattu, while P Karthikeyan has been fielded from Oosudu.

topStories.title: White House launches new app for real-time updates, live streams ‘straight from the source’ - Details here
topStories.description: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called the app ‘incredible’ and Director of Communications Steven Cheung teased Easter Eggs ‘sprinkled throughout’

topStories.title: Congress terms price reduction as a ploy to help oil firms and cautions of a hike after polls
Opposition’s notice seeking removal of Chief Election Commissioner still unacknowledged: Derek O’Brien
topStories.description: Senior Trinamool Congress leader alleges ‘tacit understanding’ between Centre and Election Commission on the matter

topStories.title: Gold Price Today: MCX Futures Surges Nearly 4% Amid US-Iran War Uncertainty
topStories.description: The precious metalwas near $4,500 an ounce, having risen almost 3% amid uncertainty over a potential ceasefire agreement.

topStories.title: 'Launching Soon, Right?' White House Shares Cryptic Posts Amid Iran War
topStories.description: "It's launching soon, right?" Deleted clip, static visuals and vague "SOON" message leave internet guessing amid heightened US-Iran tensions.

topStories.title: US-Iran war: Egypt's restaurants, malls to partially close amid energy woes — will it impact tourists?
topStories.description: Middle-East crisis: Egypt Prime Minister Mostafa Madbouly said shops, shopping centres, restaurants and cafes will all close at 9:00 pm on weekdays.

topStories.title: Congress Rebels To Contest Against Allies DMK, VCK In 6 Puducherry Seats
topStories.description: VCK chief Thirumavalvan blamed the Congress for the confusion between the allies and announced that his party will contest independently in two constituencies.

topStories.title: United States only confident that about one-third of Iran’s missile arsenal, drones have been destroyed so far
topStories.description: Despite US-Israeli attacks aimed at crippling Iran's missile arsenal, the country continues missile launches daily. Estimates reveal only a third of missiles confirmed destroyed, while Iran asserts ongoing production and capability, posing potential risks to US interests.

topStories.title: Russian man, Barron Trump and ‘jealousy’: Matvei Rumiantsev assaulted woman on video call, get 4 years in jail
topStories.description: The case unexpectedly involved US President Donald Trump’s son Barron Trump, who told UK police he’d witnessed the attack during a video call last year.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump calls for AI in education as US' student scores hit 20-year low: 35% 12th graders proficient in reading
dailyNews.description: Citing NAEP's 2024 national sampling, Melania Trump said that USA's average scores have reached their lowest levels in 20 years

dailyNews.title: Nixon to Trump: Pakistan’s long record as backchannel between rival powers
dailyNews.description: Islamabad reprises its role as diplomatic broker as US and Iran edge closer to wider confrontation.

dailyNews.title: Norway to add more than $11bn to defence budget over 10 years
dailyNews.description: Norway, as well as other NATO countries, has been under pressure from the US to boost defence spending.

dailyNews.title: US-based burger chain awarded  ₹15 crore in bonuses to employees under pressure
dailyNews.description: The demand was so high that several outlets suffered severe shortages and were even compelled to close early. Despite these challenges, employees managed long queues and handled the intense pressure well.

dailyNews.title: Schiff threatens to investigate ABC, CBS for their Trump settlements if Dems take control of Congress
dailyNews.description: Sen. Adam Schiff, D-Calif., warned news outlets, like ABC News and CBS News, that made settlements to President Donald Trump will face investigations if Democrats win back Congress.

dailyNews.title: FBI says 'malicious actors' targeted Patel's personal email, Iran-based hacking group claims responsibility
dailyNews.description: The FBI says “malicious actors" targeted Director Patel’s personal email, adding the information exposed was historical and not government-related.

dailyNews.title: Obama-appointed judge reverses course, rules voter ID law isn't discriminatory in GOP win
dailyNews.description: Judge Loretta Biggs, an Obama appointee, ruled North Carolina's voter ID law constitutional after a seven-year court fight, a major Republican win.

dailyNews.title: Iran backlash forces Gulf allies toward Washington as regional tensions rise
dailyNews.description: Saudi Arabia reportedly granted U.S. forces access to King Fahd Air Base for the first time since the Gulf War as Gulf states recalibrate their posture amid escalating Iranian attacks.

dailyNews.title: Guardians rookie has historic two-homer performance in regular season debut: 'He's not from this planet'
dailyNews.description: Cleveland Guardians rookie Chase DeLauter homered twice in his regular-season debut, becoming just the sixth player in MLB history to accomplish the feat.

dailyNews.title: Illegal immigrant accused of killing Chicago college student to face court after tuberculosis delay
dailyNews.description: Jose Medina-Medina, accused of killing Loyola University Chicago student Sheridan Gorman, faces his first court hearing after a tuberculosis delay.

dailyNews.title: ‘Lovers’ Lane’ murders suspect nabbed decades after couple found dead in car
dailyNews.description: Floyd William Parrott is charged with capital murder in the 1990 'Lovers' Lane' cold case killings of two Texas victims after 36 years unsolved.

dailyNews.title: Valerie Bertinelli’s body confession: Why the star says she is now ‘deformed’
dailyNews.description: Valerie Bertinelli opens up to Drew Barrymore about her memoir "Getting Naked," revealing four surgeries in 2024 and candid thoughts on her body image.

topStories.description: The Trump administration is weighing declaring Brazil’s two largest drug gangs terrorist groups, after lobbying by the sons of jailed former President Jair Bolsonaro.

topStories.description: A jumble of emissaries — a friend, a family member, a dove and a hawk — on the Iran crisis reflects President Trump’s improvisational approach.

topStories.title: One Republican Farmer in Wisconsin Is Bitter Over Trump’s Deportations
topStories.description: For 20 years, Tim O’Harrow has asked lawmakers to acknowledge that America’s food supply depends on immigrants. Politics went in the other direction.

topStories.title: Europeans Are Angry at Trump, but Often Forgiving of Americans
topStories.description: A generation ago, foreign fury over the Iraq invasion often blurred into anti-Americanism. Now, some Europeans seem ready to distinguish between the president and the American people.

topStories.title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Across U.S. Cities: What We Know
topStories.description: Thousands of demonstrations against the Trump administration are scheduled to take place in cities and towns across the country on Saturday.

dailyNews.description: Thousands of demonstrations against the Trump administration are scheduled to take place in cities and towns across the country on Saturday.

dailyNews.title: Iran war rages, Strait of Hormuz still blocked as Trump pushes for a deal
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration expects Iran's formal response to its 15-point peace proposal today, as Tehran continues blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Could Trump suspend the federal gas tax as the Iran war continues?
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he could consider suspending the federal gas tax as the conflict in the Middle East continues. Barron's reporter Jacob Sonenshine joins CBS News with more.

dailyNews.title: Israel says it will continue to "hammer" Iran even as Trump seeks deal with Tehran
dailyNews.description: Danny Danon, Israel's ambassador to the United Nations, says America's top ally in the Middle East will continue to strike Iran despite U.S. efforts to negotiate with Tehran.

dailyNews.title: Brent oil tops $110 again after Chinese ships are turned away from Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: David Sacks says his time as Trump's crypto and AI czar has ended
dailyNews.description: The venture capitalist said he will still be a part of the White House's Technology committee and will help push Trump's AI plan forward.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump Delays Strikes on Iran's Energy Sector for 10 More Days
dailyNews.description: After nearly one month of war, the United States, Israel and Iran are continuing to trade air and drone strikes. Now President Donald Trump says they’re also trading potential peace plans but Iran is continuing to publicly dispute that any talks are underway. It comes as the president is extending a deadline he gave Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz of face attacks against its power plants. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY from the White House.

dailyNews.title: Ambitious, authoritarian and talking to Trump? The hard-liners rising in Iran
dailyNews.description: The Israeli military has systematically killed Iran’s top leaders, so when President Donald Trump said this week that talks are being held with Iran, the biggest question was: Who exactly is the U.S. talking to

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Melania Trump showcases robot guest at WH summit
dailyNews.description: A walking, talking humanoid robot strolled side-by-side with first lady Melania Trump at the White House for the second day of her international technology summit.
